steps.title: Identify the parts and set up the equation
steps.content:
The 125 cm segment is divided into three parts: one part is 49 cm, and the other two parts are equal. Let $x$ represent the length of each equal part.

Since the three parts make up the total length:
$$49 + x + x = 125$$
$$49 + 2x = 125$$

steps.title: Solve for x
steps.content:
Subtract 49 from both sides:
$$2x = 125 - 49$$
$$2x = 76$$

Divide both sides by 2:
$$x = 38$$

Each of the two equal parts is 38 cm. Verify: $49 + 38 + 38 = 125$ ✓
